title: nephrodium filix-mas var. polylepis
intro: Nephrodium filix-mas var. polylepis, also known as polylepis fern, is a specific variety of the fern species Nephrodium filix-mas, which is native to Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nephrodium filix-mas var. polylepis include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and alleviate various health conditions.
